matrix.problem:
there is no way
to check that an edited cluster config is well-formed before a deploy begins
matrix.spec_quote:
`dscli validate_config` is a read-only subcommand that loads a datasystem cluster
config file (the `cluster_config.json` that `generate_config` writes and operators
then hand-edit) and reports every structural problem before a deploy runs

matrix.problem: A missing or empty `worker_nodes` list is only discovered mid-deploy
An out-of-range or non-integer `worker_port` surfaces as an opaque failure
matrix.spec_quote:
a `worker_port`
  that is missing or is not an integer within 1–65535

matrix.problem:
Missing SSH credentials (`ssh_auth.ssh_user_name` / `ssh_private_key`) fail
   late during multi-node fan-out instead of up front.
matrix.spec_quote:
a missing or non-object
  `ssh_auth` or a blank `ssh_auth.ssh_user_name` / `ssh_auth.ssh_private_key`

accumulating every problem in a
  single pass

matrix.problem: returning a non-zero exit code when the config is invalid
matrix.spec_quote:
MUST return a non-zero exit code when the file is
  missing or unreadable, is not valid JSON, or describes an invalid config, and a
  zero exit code only when the config has no problems.
